# bytebase_idp (Data Source)

The identity provider data source.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource_id` (String) The identity provider unique resource id.

### Read-Only

- `domain` (String) The domain for email matching when using this identity provider.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ldap_config` (List of Object) The LDAP identity provider configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ldap_config))
- `name` (String) The identity provider full name in idps/{resource id} format.
- `oauth2_config` (List of Object) The OAuth2 identity provider configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth2_config))
- `oidc_config` (List of Object) The OIDC identity provider configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oidc_config))
- `title` (String) The identity provider display title.
- `type` (String) The identity provider type. One of OAUTH2, OIDC, LDAP.

<a id="nestedatt--ldap_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ldap_config`

Read-Only:

- `base_dn` (String)
- `bind_dn` (String)
- `bind_password` (String)
- `field_mapping` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--ldap_config--field_mapping))
- `host` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `security_protocol` (String)
- `skip_tls_verify` (Boolean)
- `user_filter` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--ldap_config--field_mapping"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ldap_config.field_mapping`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String)
- `groups` (String)
- `identifier` (String)
- `phone` (String)



<a id="nestedatt--oauth2_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oauth2_config`

Read-Only:

- `auth_style` (String)
- `auth_url` (String)
- `client_id` (String)
- `client_secret` (String)
- `field_mapping` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--oauth2_config--field_mapping))
- `scopes` (List of String)
- `skip_tls_verify` (Boolean)
- `token_url` (String)
- `user_info_url` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--oauth2_config--field_mapping"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oauth2_config.field_mapping`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String)
- `groups` (String)
- `identifier` (String)
- `phone` (String)



<a id="nestedatt--oidc_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oidc_config`

Read-Only:

- `auth_endpoint` (String)
- `auth_style` (String)
- `client_id` (String)
- `client_secret` (String)
- `field_mapping` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--oidc_config--field_mapping))
- `issuer` (String)
- `scopes` (List of String)
- `skip_tls_verify` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedobjatt--oidc_config--field_mapping"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oidc_config.field_mapping`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String)
- `groups` (String)
- `identifier` (String)
- `phone` (String)
